nasb.text: It was the same Aaron and Moses to whom the Lord said, “Bring out the sons of Israel from the land of Egypt according to their hosts.”

esv.text: These are the Aaron and Moses to whom the Lord said: “Bring out the people of Israel from the land of Egypt by their hosts.”

cnv.text: 這亞倫和摩西，耶和華曾經對他們說過：“你們要按著他們的軍隊，把以色列人從埃及地領出來。”

ccb.text: 正是亚伦和摩西受耶和华之命，要按以色列人的宗族支派把他们带出埃及。
